content: {"id":"fb_1782165211537_qu7276","signal":"positive","context":"SUCCESS: 2026-06-22: Resolved Screen Sharing and system lag on remote Mac Mini by (1) running install.sh which linked the Node.js version of hermes-yolo (resolving 7 health failures to 100% green); (2) automatically reclaiming 2 runaway Ollama workers (~21GB RAM total) via yolo-health/sim-runaway-guard.sh, increasing free RAM from 19% to 65%; (3) copying the updated test-mac-text-hotkeys-config.js to sync tests; and (4) establishing bidirectional background keep-alive ping loops between laptop (100.87.85.85) and Mac Mini (100.94.135.78), forcing a direct P2P Tailscale connection over AT&T Lightspeed and T-Mobile 5G networks, bypassing the DERP relay.","submittedContext":"SUCCESS: 2026-06-22: Resolved Screen Sharing and system lag on remote Mac Mini by (1) running install.sh which linked the Node.js version of hermes-yolo (resolving 7 health failures to 100% green); (2) automatically reclaiming 2 runaway Ollama workers (~21GB RAM total) via yolo-health/sim-runaway-guard.sh, increasing free RAM from 19% to 65%; (3) copying the updated test-mac-text-hotkeys-config.js to sync tests;
